title: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla
summary_full: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".
summary_public: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".
